top_3_picks: ForeFlight — VP Growth, Business Operations & OEM Strategy (Austin, $200K-$275K, newly PE-independent under Thoma Bravo $10.55B)
GitLab — Director, Strategy & Operations (Remote, $155K-$277K published, reports to CoS to CEO)

roles.title: VP, Growth, Business Operations & OEM Strategy
roles.company: ForeFlight (Jeppesen ForeFlight — standalone under Thoma Bravo)
roles.company_description: Leading aviation software platform — recently carved out as a standalone company under Thoma Bravo PE ($10.55B acquisition, Nov 2025). 500-1,000 employees.
roles.why_matches: Combines M&A, enterprise growth strategy, OEM partnerships, and BI/analytics leadership at a newly standalone PE-backed company — near-perfect match for Tyler's consulting + ops + data profile at a salary hitting the top of his target range.

roles.title: Director, Strategy & Operations
roles.company_description: Public DevOps platform (GTLB), fully remote company, ~2,000 employees.
roles.why_matches: Reports to Chief of Staff to the CEO; owns 2-3 high-priority cross-functional initiatives (market entries, pricing, org realignments) — ideal scope and seniority for an ex-Deloitte strategy operator.

roles.title: Strategic Operations Lead
roles.company_description: Restaurant SaaS platform (websites, online ordering, marketing). Series C unicorn — $120M raised at $1B valuation (May 2025). Remote-first. 10,000+ restaurant customers.
roles.why_matches: First hire on strategic ops team, partnering with COO/Chief of Staff to own highest-leverage cross-functional projects — entrepreneurial, high-impact role with pre-IPO equity.

roles.title: Chief of Staff to CEO
roles.company_description: Fintech homeownership rewards platform. Founded 2023 by ex-Uber/Amex/Capital One team. Austin in-person.
roles.why_matches: High-ownership CoS role scaling a fintech startup from 25 to 2,000+ employees — directly leverages Tyler's consulting and ops leadership background in Austin.

roles.title: Head of Operations
roles.company_description: Same company — separate ops-focused opening alongside the CoS role.
roles.why_matches: Building operational infrastructure from scratch at a high-velocity fintech — complementary to the CoS role, both are open simultaneously.

roles.title: Senior Director, Revenue Operations & Strategy
roles.company_description: Construction/field intelligence SaaS platform. $300M+ raised, ~400 employees. Remote-first.
roles.why_matches: Owns GTM strategy, forecasting, pipeline governance, AI-enabled RevOps, and analytics as they scale toward $100M ARR — directly hits Tyler's data analytics and strategy ops strengths.

roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.company_description: Credit-building fintech, Austin HQ, growth-stage (~500 employees).
roles.why_matches: Reports to CEO, leads strategic business planning, organizational planning, and high-priority program management — classic consulting-to-CoS pipeline role.

roles.title: Chief of Staff, Strategy & Ops
roles.company_description: People analytics + executive network SaaS platform used by Figma, Notion, OpenAI CHROs. $50M raised from Accel, EQT, Menlo.
roles.why_matches: Supports CEO/GM on AI workflows and GTM strategy — Tyler's intersection of consulting rigor, data analytics, and Next.js/Python builds is rare and explicitly valued here.

roles.title: Chief of Staff, Strategy
roles.company_description: Healthcare technology platform for independent primary care ACOs. Series F unicorn, $3.5B valuation, $1.18B total raised, ~1,574 employees. Remote-first.
roles.why_matches: Partners with Chief Strategy Officer to align strategic priorities — MBA + multi-stakeholder strategy execution from Deloitte is near-exact match at a Series F scale.

roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.company_description: Utility SaaS platform (water, electric, gas). Backed by Norwest Venture Partners + Insight Partners (2026). ~285 employees.
roles.why_matches: Strategic operator partnered with SVP Client Solutions driving cross-functional execution — classic post-consulting CoS playbook.

roles.title: Director, Revenue Operations
roles.company_description: Health insurance platform for SMBs. Series C, Austin-HQ'd, ~200 employees, VC-backed.
roles.why_matches: Leads revenue analytics, enablement, and process management at an Austin-rooted company — squarely in Tyler's analytics + operations lane.

roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.company_description: Warehouse robotics/drone intelligence platform. Series B-stage, ~100 employees.
roles.why_matches: Works directly with CEO on strategic and operational priorities at a high-growth robotics platform — tech-adjacent role where Tyler's Next.js/Python fluency is a differentiator.

roles.title: Chief of Staff, Strategy & Ops (FSG)
roles.company_description: Mission-driven strategy consulting and advisory firm. Remote (contiguous US). Direct report to CEO.
roles.why_matches: Senior leadership team CoS with CEO reporting line — consulting + MBA from Deloitte/Rice is precisely the credential FSG's mission-driven model requires.

roles.title: AI Operations Strategy Director
roles.company_description: Leading real estate marketplace, subsidiary of News Corp. Austin, TX office. 1,000+ employees.
roles.why_matches: Directs 5 AI Solutions Engineers to ship AI-powered workflow automation — Python/data skills plus consulting-led strategic thinking are tailor-made for this role.

roles.title: Director, Strategy & Operations (market pool)
roles.company_description: 1,000+ Strategy & Operations roles in Austin metro (71 new as of April 2026). Companies include AlertMedia, Arrive Logistics, SolarWinds, WP Engine, BigCommerce, Coder (just raised $90M Series C, KKR April 2026).
roles.company_size: Mix of growth-stage tech, PE-backed, and enterprise
roles.why_matches: Broad active pool of Director-level S&O roles in Austin including at newly-funded Coder (KKR-backed $90M Series C, April 2026) and other fast-growing Austin tech companies.

market_signals.temperature_notes: LinkedIn shows 1,000+ Strategy & Operations roles in Austin metro (71 new), 146 Chief of Staff roles (8 new), and 67+ Director of Analytics roles as of April 2026. Remote demand is also strong — 340+ remote CoS openings nationally. Market is active but competitive; Director-level roles attract ex-consultants with 8-15 years experience.

salary_trends.pe_backed_premium: PE-backed and late-stage startups pay toward top of bands plus equity/profit-sharing
salary_trends.ai_fluency_premium: 10-20% over non-technical peers for roles with AI tooling requirements

in_demand_skills: Cross-functional program execution (owning complex, ambiguous initiatives end-to-end)
Data analytics & BI (SQL, Python, Tableau/Power BI) — Tyler's tech fluency is a differentiator
AI/automation fluency (AI-enabled GTM stacks, workflow automation) — explicitly in 2026 CoS and RevOps roles
Strategic planning & OKR frameworks (operating cadence design, annual planning)
Stakeholder management & executive presence (presenting to boards, investors, C-suite)
M&A and partnership evaluation (especially at PE-backed companies)
active_hiring_companies: ForeFlight / Jeppesen (Austin, newly PE-independent under Thoma Bravo, $200K-$275K VP role)
Mesa (Austin, both CoS and Head of Ops open simultaneously)
Sana Benefits (Austin-rooted, multiple ops/strategy roles live)
Owner.com (Remote-first, first-hire ops role open, $160K-$185K listed)
Coder (Austin, just raised $90M Series C from KKR, April 2026 — likely expanding)
Apptronik (Austin robotics, 52 open Austin roles, $431M raised)
notable_trends: PE-backed portcos actively building VP-level strategy/ops leadership — ForeFlight is the clearest example
AI-adjacent strategy/ops roles bucking 2026 tech salary stagnation (+1.6% YoY avg overall)
CoS roles proliferating at Series B-D companies scaling from 50-500 employees
Remote-first broadly accepted for Director+ strategy/ops — most roles are remote-eligible
Austin is genuine competitor to SF/NYC; multiple remote companies list Austin as preferred hub
Tyler's Python/Next.js technical fluency is a standout differentiator vs. pure MBA candidates — explicitly call this out in AI-adjacent applications

top_3_picks.reason: Austin in-person, $200K-$275K, newly PE-independent under Thoma Bravo — M&A + growth strategy + BI/analytics scope is Tyler's exact profile at the top of his salary target

top_3_picks.title: Director, Strategy & Operations
top_3_picks.reason: Remote, published salary $155K-$277K, reports to CoS to CEO owning cross-functional strategic initiatives — perfect scope for ex-Deloitte operator

top_3_picks.title: Strategic Operations Lead

summary.recommendation: Lead with ForeFlight (Austin, top of comp range, PE-backed VP scope) and GitLab (remote, published salary at Director level). Owner.com is the strongest remote option with listed comp. For Austin in-person, Mesa has two simultaneous openings (CoS + Head of Ops) at a repeat-founder fintech. Tyler's Python/AI fluency should be highlighted explicitly in apps to Knoetic, Realtor.com, and DroneDeploy where it commands a 10-20% premium.
